data.title: Braskem Board Expands Executive Authority for 2026 Financing Operations
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Braskem SA ( (BAK) ) just unveiled an update.

At a board of directors meeting held on January 21, 2026, Braskem S.A. approved new delegation limits that give its Executive Board broader autonomy to contract loans, finance leases, financings, capital markets transactions and other financial operations in Brazil and abroad during fiscal year 2026. The board authorized the Executive Board to execute transactions of up to US$250 million or R$1.0 billion per operation, subject to a gross corporate debt cap of US$10.3 billion excluding Braskem Idesa and TQPM financings, and to engage guarantees with annual commission obligations of up to R$480 million per operation, while larger deals above specified thresholds must be reported to the Finance and Investment Committee. The move, valid until the first ordinary board meeting of 2027, is designed to streamline Braskem’s financial decision-making, potentially accelerating funding, hedging and risk-management activities and signaling an emphasis on financial flexibility and responsiveness in its capital structure management.

The most recent analyst rating on (BAK) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Braskem SA stock, see the BAK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BAK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BAK is a Neutral.

Braskem SA’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, with high leverage and declining profitability being the most critical factors. While there are some positive aspects, such as improved EBITDA and liquidity, these are overshadowed by ongoing industry pressures and valuation concerns. Technical analysis provides a neutral outlook, with mixed signals on momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on BAK stock, click here.

More about Braskem SA

Braskem S.A. is a publicly held Brazilian petrochemical company based in Camaçari, Bahia, operating in the chemical and plastics industry with a focus on producing petrochemical derivatives and related products for domestic and international markets.

Average Trading Volume: 1,149,931

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.48B

data.title: OKYO Pharma Advances Urcosimod With Positive Interim Results and FDA Alignment on Phase 2b/3 NCP Trial
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from OKYO Pharma Limited Sponsored ADR ( (OKYO) ) is now available.

On January 30, 2026, OKYO Pharma reported interim results for the six months ended September 30, 2025, highlighting a series of clinical, regulatory and financial milestones that advance its lead drug urcosimod for neuropathic corneal pain. Over the period, the company generated positive long-term stability data for urcosimod, secured FDA Fast Track Designation for its use in NCP, and reported strong topline Phase 2 proof‑of‑concept data in 18 patients, with 75% of per‑protocol participants achieving more than 80% pain reduction on the Visual Analogue Scale after 12 weeks, while also outlining a registration strategy that includes a planned 150‑patient multicenter Phase 2b/3 trial. OKYO supplemented this clinical progress with $1.9 million in non‑dilutive funding in July 2025 and improved its balance sheet to $4.2 million in cash and $4.6 million in total assets as of the period end, while narrowing its comprehensive loss to $3.0 million from $3.2 million a year earlier. In early 2026 the company further strengthened its leadership and regulatory position by appointing ophthalmology industry veteran Robert J. Dempsey as chief executive officer, transitioning former CEO Gary S. Jacob to chief development officer, and securing FDA alignment in a January 28, 2026 Type C meeting on the design, endpoints, and chemistry, manufacturing and controls strategy for the planned Phase 2b/3 urcosimod trial, in a move that de‑risks its pivotal program and positions OKYO as an emerging player in addressing a major unmet need in ophthalmology.

The most recent analyst rating on (OKYO) stock is a Hold with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on OKYO Pharma Limited Sponsored ADR stock, see the OKYO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OKYO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OKYO is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak fundamentals (pre-revenue, ongoing losses, negative free cash flow, and negative equity) despite improved 2025 cost and cash-burn trends and zero debt. Technicals are a meaningful offset with strong momentum above key moving averages, while valuation remains challenged due to negative earnings and no indicated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on OKYO stock, click here.

More about OKYO Pharma Limited Sponsored ADR

OKYO Pharma Limited is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market, focused on developing innovative therapies for neuropathic corneal pain (NCP) and other inflammatory eye diseases. Its lead candidate, urcosimod, recently completed a successful Phase 2 trial in NCP, a debilitating ocular condition with no FDA-approved treatments, and the company is concentrating its pipeline and resources on advancing this asset through late-stage development.

Average Trading Volume: 192,891

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $82.37M

data.title: Nyxoah Expands Belgian Manufacturing Hub to Support Global Growth in OSA Therapy
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Nyxoah ( (NYXH) ).

On January 21, 2026, Nyxoah SA announced a new investment to further expand its Belgian manufacturing capacity as it scales up to meet growing demand for its Genio obstructive sleep apnea therapy in the United States and international markets. In addition to its existing contract manufacturing in the U.S., the company will establish a nearly 2,000-square-meter facility with a state-of-the-art cleanroom at LégiaPark in the Liège region, developed in partnership with ABN Cleanroom Technology and supported by local investor Noshaq, a move aimed at improving gross margins, securing supply, and reinforcing Nyxoah’s integration into Belgium’s life sciences ecosystem while contributing to job creation and strengthening its global MedTech manufacturing footprint.

The most recent analyst rating on (NYXH) stock is a Buy with a EUR11.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nyxoah stock, see the NYXH Stock Forecast page.

More about Nyxoah

Nyxoah SA is a Belgium-based medical technology company focused on developing and commercializing innovative neuromodulation solutions to treat obstructive sleep apnea (OSA), the most common sleep-disordered breathing condition associated with elevated mortality and cardiovascular risk. Its lead product, the Genio system, is a patient-centered, leadless and battery-free hypoglossal neurostimulation therapy that has held a CE Mark since 2019 and received FDA approval in August 2025 for a subset of adults with moderate to severe OSA; the company is listed on Euronext Brussels and Nasdaq and targets both European and U.S. OSA markets, including patients with Complete Concentric Collapse, a group currently contraindicated for competing therapies.

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Check-Cap ( (MBAI) ).

On January 30, 2026, Check-Cap filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission providing financial information related to its planned merger with MBody AI Corp., following shareholder approval of the deal at its annual general meeting on November 14, 2025. The filing includes audited financial statements of MBody AI for the period from its formation on October 7, 2024 through December 31, 2024 and for the six months ended June 30, 2025, along with unaudited pro forma condensed combined financial data illustrating how the merged entity’s balance sheet and results of operations might look. Check-Cap and MBody AI reiterated that they are working toward closing the merger in the first half of 2026, but cautioned that completion remains subject to multiple conditions and uncertainties, notably securing sufficient capital to meet Nasdaq listing standards and finishing regulatory and exchange reviews, meaning there is no guarantee that the transaction will be completed on the anticipated timeline or at all, a key consideration for investors and other stakeholders assessing the company’s strategic transition.

data.title: Avidity Biosciences Sets February Vote on $72-per-Share Novartis Takeover and Cardiology Spin-Off
data.description:
New activity is brewing for Avidity Biosciences ( (RNA) ). The company has submitted a Form DEFM14A to the SEC, indicating an upcoming shareholder vote. This form gives shareholders all the information they need to develop an informed vote. Read on to learn more about the proposed company action.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

On January 30, 2026, Avidity Biosciences issued a definitive proxy statement convening a virtual special shareholders’ meeting for February 23, 2026 to vote on a proposed acquisition by Novartis AG and a related spin-off transaction. Under an October 25, 2025 merger agreement, Novartis’ Ajax Acquisition Sub would merge with Avidity, making Avidity an indirect wholly owned subsidiary of Novartis and converting each Avidity share into the right to receive $72 in cash, subject to shareholder approval by a majority of outstanding shares. In parallel, a separation and distribution agreement signed the same day would reorganize Avidity’s business so that a new subsidiary, Atrium Therapeutics (SpinCo), holds the company’s early-stage precision cardiology programs and certain collaborations, with those assets either distributed pro rata as SpinCo shares to Avidity shareholders (one SpinCo share for every ten Avidity shares) or potentially sold to a third party, with net cash proceeds distributed to shareholders and equity award holders. The board unanimously endorsed the merger and spin-off package, recommended shareholders vote in favor of the transactions and related proposals, and outlined appraisal rights for investors who oppose the deal, underscoring that completion of both the merger and spin-off hinges on shareholder approval at the February meeting.

The most recent analyst rating on (RNA) stock is a Hold with a $72.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Avidity Biosciences stock, see the RNA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RNA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RNA is a Neutral.

The overall stock score reflects a mix of strong technical momentum and positive corporate events, particularly the merger with Novartis, which is a major strategic development. However, financial performance challenges, including negative profitability and cash flow, weigh on the score. The valuation reflects typical biotech growth characteristics, with a focus on future potential rather than current earnings.

To see Spark’s full report on RNA stock, click here.

More about Avidity Biosciences

Avidity Biosciences, Inc., based in San Diego, is a biotechnology company developing RNA-based therapies, including programs in early-stage precision cardiology targeting rare genetic cardiomyopathies such as phospholamban-related disease and Protein Kinase AMP-activated non-catalytic subunit Gamma 2 Syndrome. The company also maintains collaboration agreements with large pharmaceutical partners including Bristol-Myers Squibb and Eli Lilly, and operates within the broader biopharmaceutical sector focused on rare and serious diseases.

Average Trading Volume: 2,736,444

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $10.92B

Find detailed analytics on RNA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Arrive AI Secures $10 Million Financing via Note
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Arrive AI Inc. ( (ARAI) ) has provided an update.

On January 26, 2026, Arrive AI Inc. entered into a $10 million Pre-Paid Purchase No. 4 financing with Streeterville Capital, LLC under a previously established purchase agreement, issuing an unsecured promissory note with an original principal balance of $10.8 million that carries an 8% annual interest rate and features an $800,000 original issue discount. The structure allows Streeterville, at its discretion, to convert amounts outstanding into Arrive AI common shares at a price tied to the Nasdaq listing reference price or a discount to recent VWAPs, subject to a $0.25 per share floor and a 9.99% beneficial ownership cap, while exposing the company to potential cash repayment obligations and accelerated default provisions if its share price falls or certain covenants are breached. The company closed the transaction on December 26, 2026, receiving $10 million in proceeds, agreed via a side letter on January 26, 2026 to file a registration statement by February 9, 2026 to register at least 10 million purchase shares, and engaged Maxim Group LLC as placement agent with a 4% cash fee, underscoring its continued reliance on private, exempt securities offerings to secure funding and manage its capital structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (ARAI) stock is a Sell with a $2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Arrive AI Inc. stock, see the ARAI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ARAI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ARAI is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by very weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, negative cash flow, and negative equity). The latest update is out from Sinovac Biotech ( (SVA) ).

On January 22, 2026, Sinovac Biotech announced that a Nasdaq Hearings Panel has granted the company continued listing on The Nasdaq Stock Market, conditional on Sinovac remedying its filing delinquencies by completing its 2024 annual report on Form 20-F and a Form 6-K interim balance sheet and income statement for the second quarter of 2025 by May 11, 2026. The company, which recently appointed Zhonghua Certified Public Accountants LLP as its independent auditor, said it is working to complete the required audit and regulatory filings to regain full compliance with Nasdaq’s reporting rules, a move that preserves its U.S. listing for now but places it under a clear deadline that will be closely watched by investors and other stakeholders concerned about its disclosure and governance standards.

More about Sinovac Biotech

Sinovac Biotech Ltd. is a China-based global biopharmaceutical company specializing in the research, development, manufacturing and commercialization of vaccines and related biological products targeting human infectious diseases. Its diversified portfolio includes vaccines for influenza, viral hepatitis, varicella, Hand-Foot-Mouth disease, poliomyelitis and pneumococcal disease, with three products prequalified by the World Health Organization, and it has played a prominent role in developing vaccines for major public health emergencies including SARS, H5N1, H1N1 and COVID-19 while expanding its global footprint through international partnerships and localized production.

data.title: CSG Shareholders Approve Merger to Become NEC Subsidiary
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from CSG Systems International ( (CSGS) ).

On January 30, 2026, CSG Systems International, Inc. held a special meeting of stockholders at which a quorum of 23,588,332 shares of common stock was present or represented by proxy, out of 28,520,509 shares outstanding as of the December 10, 2025 record date. Stockholders overwhelmingly approved the Agreement and Plan of Merger with Japan’s NEC Corporation and its wholly owned subsidiary, Canvas Transaction Company, Inc., under which Canvas will merge with and into CSG, and CSG will survive as a wholly owned subsidiary of NEC, while also giving non-binding advisory approval to the merger-related compensation for CSG’s named executive officers. The adjournment proposal was not needed because the merger agreement received sufficient support, and, assuming all remaining customary closing conditions and regulatory approvals are satisfied on time, the companies expect to close the transaction within the 2026 calendar year, marking a significant step toward CSG’s transition into NEC’s corporate structure and potentially altering its future strategic direction and governance for existing stakeholders.

ArcelorMittal ( (MT) ) has issued an update.

On 30 January 2026, the Government of Liberia and ArcelorMittal signed and ratified an amended long-term Mineral Development Agreement extending the company’s mining rights to 2050, with an option for a further 25 years, cementing ArcelorMittal’s commitment to its Liberian iron ore operations and confirming multi‑user access principles for the Tokadeh–Buchanan rail corridor. The deal underpins ArcelorMittal’s $1.8 billion expansion project—centered on a new state-of-the-art iron ore concentrator at Tokadeh and major rail, port and power investments—which will lift iron ore shipments from about 5 million tonnes annually to 20 million tonnes in 2026, with feasibility studies under way for output beyond that level; in return for extended mining rights and reserved rail capacity, ArcelorMittal will pay Liberia $200 million, while the upgraded infrastructure and quadrupling of exports are expected to significantly boost Liberian GDP, tax and royalty receipts, employment and local business activity, reinforcing both the country’s status as a regional mining hub and the company’s long-term position in West African iron ore.

An announcement from Azul SA ( (DE:8AZ0) ) is now available.

On January 30, 2026, Azul S.A. announced that its subsidiary Azul Secured Finance LLP priced a private offering of US$1.375 billion in 9.875% senior secured notes due 2031, with closing expected on February 6, 2026, subject to customary conditions. The oversubscribed issue, intended as exit financing under Azul’s U.S. Chapter 11 restructuring plan, will be used primarily to repay debtor-in-possession financing and, with any remaining proceeds, to support a broader capital structure overhaul and liquidity enhancement, backed by guarantees from key subsidiaries and first-priority liens over receivables from its loyalty, travel package and cargo units, related intellectual property, and equity interests; the move underscores continued progress on Azul’s court-approved restructuring roadmap and aims to provide greater operational stability and predictability for stakeholders as the company advances through its Chapter 11 milestones.

The most recent analyst rating on (DE:8AZ0) stock is a Sell with a EUR0.06 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Azul SA stock, see the DE:8AZ0 Stock Forecast page.

More about Azul SA

Azul S.A. is Brazil’s largest airline by number of cities served, operating roughly 800 daily flights to over 137 destinations with a fleet of more than 200 aircraft and a workforce exceeding 15,000 crewmembers. The carrier flies more than 400 nonstop routes and complements its core passenger business with loyalty (TudoAzul), travel package (Azul Viagens) and cargo (Azul Cargo) operations, and has been recognized internationally for punctuality and service quality, including being named one of the world’s most punctual airlines in 2023 by Cirium.

data.title: Civitas Resources Completes Merger with SM Energy, Delists
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Civitas Resources ( (CIVI) ).

On January 30, 2026, Civitas Resources completed its merger with SM Energy under a previously agreed merger agreement, resulting in each outstanding share of Civitas common stock (other than certain cancelled shares and treasury stock) being converted into the right to receive 1.45 shares of SM Energy common stock. In connection with the deal, SM Energy assumed all outstanding Civitas equity awards—restricted stock units, performance stock units and stock options—adjusting them into SM Energy equity instruments based on the same 1.45 exchange ratio and preserving their existing terms other than performance conditions for the PSU awards. Following completion of the transaction, Civitas common stock was delisted from the New York Stock Exchange and deregistered under the Exchange Act, with trading in Civitas shares ceasing prior to the market open on January 30, 2026, and Civitas indicating it will seek suspension of its reporting obligations. As a result of the first-step merger, all Civitas directors and officers terminated their roles without any stated disagreements over operations or policies, while SM Energy’s pre‑existing certificate of incorporation and by-laws remained in place as the governing documents of the surviving corporation, consolidating control and simplifying the combined entity’s corporate structure for shareholders and regulators.

The most recent analyst rating on (CIVI) stock is a Hold with a $27.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Civitas Resources stock, see the CIVI Stock Forecast page.

data.title: ModuLink to Acquire Majority Stake in ASA Robotics
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from ModuLink ( (MDLK) ) is now available.

On January 26, 2026, ModuLink Inc., through its wholly owned Hong Kong subsidiary ModuLink InnoTech Limited, executed a definitive Share Purchase Agreement to acquire a 60% equity stake in Hong Kong-based ASA Robotics Limited, an AI and robotics solutions provider, from major shareholder Wah Shing Lam in exchange for 6,500 Series A preferred shares valued at about HKD 5 million (approximately USD 641,026), with closing expected on or before February 28, 2026. The deal, which will give ModuLink majority ownership, board representation and governance rights in ASA while keeping ASA’s management in place, is intended to strengthen ModuLink’s position in robotics, AI, healthcare automation, elderly care and smart facility management by leveraging ASA’s installed base and project pipeline in Hong Kong public hospitals, and is expected to underpin post-acquisition growth as ASA continues deployments and trials across multiple healthcare institutions.

More about ModuLink

ModuLink Inc. is a technology-focused company developing sustainable and intelligent living environments, specializing in Modular Integrated Construction, air-to-water technology and IoT-based property management systems for scalable, eco-friendly developments. Through its ModuLink brand, the company targets smart, green communities that integrate advanced technologies for smart living, healthcare, elderly care and smart facility management applications.
